# FileShrinkr
> Free online image compression and editing at https://fileshrinkr.com

## Summary
FileShrinkr helps users compress images and perform basic edits in the browser. Compression runs server-side; the image editor (crop, resize, rotate, flip) runs client-side with HTML5 Canvas.

## Primary URL
- https://fileshrinkr.com/

## Features
- Compress JPG, PNG, WEBP, SVG → JPG, WEBP, or PDF
- Adjustable compression quality (1–100)
- Batch upload; multiple files download as ZIP
- Merge multiple images into one PDF
- Optional lossless PDF (img2pdf) vs compressed PDF (Pillow)
- Client-side image editor with undo/redo

## API
- POST /compress — multipart form upload; returns JSON with download_url
- GET /static/{filename} — download compressed output
- GET /ads.txt — Google AdSense authorized sellers

## Tech stack
- Backend: Python Flask, FFmpeg, Pillow, img2pdf
- Frontend: HTML, Tailwind CSS, vanilla JavaScript
- Deployment: Docker on port 3000

## Publisher
DSnM Solutions

## Optional
- Sitemap: https://fileshrinkr.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://fileshrinkr.com/robots.txt
